name: Stir-Fried Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Fresh asparagus (stalks cut into 2-inch pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add oil to a large nonstick skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic and stir for about 1 minute.
3. Add asparagus tips and stalk pieces and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
4. Mix together black bean sauce, chicken broth, soy sauce, and sesame oil in a small container.
5. Pour the mixture over the asparagus and stir until heated through and asparagus is tender-crisp.
6. Serve immediately.
